text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: When I lost my last race, I was sooo frustrated!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But this time I'm definitely gonna get first! I'll win and be sooo happy!
choice_data_list: Yeah, you can do it, Winning Ticket!
Yeah, you can do it, Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thaaaank youuuu! That encouragement is
overflowing me with POWEEER!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run all I've got, and more! I'll be
stronger than ever!
